Rec Center Lobby.name: Rec Center Lobby
Rec Center Lobby.description: The linoleum is peeling. A trophy case rattles as a heavy door slams somewhere deep in the building. The smell of chlorine is faint but distinct. To the west is the Pool. To the east is the Gym.
Rec Center Lobby.first_entry_text: You walk in through the squeaky glass doors. The receptionist is nowhere to be found, but you can hear the chaotic echoing sounds of the community center all around you.

furniture.name: Front Desk
furniture.description: Cluttered with sign-in sheets and lost-and-found bins.

furniture.name: Vending Machine
furniture.description: The coil holding a bag of chips is stuck halfway. The machine hums loudly.

Natatorium.name: Natatorium
Natatorium.description: The air is humid and reeks of chemicals. The blue water of the pool churns slightly near the deep-end drains. The tile deck is lethally slippery.

furniture.name: Lifeguard Chair
furniture.description: A tall metal structure leaning over the deep end. The bolts at the base look rusted through.

Pump Room.name: Pump Room
Pump Room.description: A deafening mechanical roar. Massive PVC pipes snake everywhere, dripping condensation. A heavy industrial breaker box governs the power to the entire facility.

furniture.name: Chlorine Tank
furniture.description: A heavy yellow cylinder. It hisses faintly.

furniture.name: Maintenance Locker
furniture.description: A rusted locker holding pool testing kits and heavy tools.

Gymnasium.name: Gymnasium
Gymnasium.description: The polished wood floor echoes with every footstep. Massive motorized bleachers loom on one side, retracted into a dark, heavy wall of timber and steel.

furniture.name: Equipment Bin
furniture.description: A large wire mesh bin filled with deflated basketballs and jump ropes.
